title: Legacy Mechanics: Addon
description: Addon to Legacy Mechanics that completes the Legacy experience!
body: --- ## 📖 Description **Legacy Mechanics: Addon** is a **companion resource pack** for **[Legacy Mechanics](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legacy-mechanics)** that completes the nostalgic console experience by restoring **classic item names and labels** from the **Legacy Console Editions** of Minecraft. This addon focuses purely on **visual and naming nostalgia**, leaving gameplay untouched while ensuring every item and block name matches how it appeared on the old console versions. Some of the restored names include: * **Jack o’Lantern → Jack-O-Lantern** * **Jungle Sapling → Jungle Tree Sapling** * **Short Grass → Tall Grass** * **Tall Grass → Double Tall Grass** Perfect for players who want their world to *look* and *feel* just like Minecraft on Xbox 360, PS3, Wii U, and other Legacy Console Editions. --- ## ✨ Features * Restores classic **console-era item and block names**. * Designed to pair seamlessly with the **Legacy Mechanics** datapack. * Works standalone for those who just want the nostalgic text changes. * Lightweight and fully compatible with other texture or sound packs. --- ## 🌌 Nostalgia Combine with these for the full Legacy Console feel: * [**Legacy Mechanics**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legacy-mechanics) to bring back console-era mechanics and gameplay tweaks. * [**Legacy4J**](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) to bring back every aspect of Legacy Console Edition to modern versions. * [**Golden Days**](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days/releases) for classic pre-1.14 textures. * [**Nostalgic Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) for old fog, skies, and lighting. * [**Moderner Beta**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) for terrain generation in a console-like style. --- ## ⚙️ Compatibility * ✅ Works with **Minecraft 1.21.x** and newer. * 🧱 Compatible with both **vanilla** and **modded** installations. --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the pack. 2. Place the `.zip` file in your `resourcepacks/` folder. 3. Enable it in Minecraft’s **Resource Packs** menu, ensuring it’s above any other packs that alter language files. 4. Enjoy the authentic **console-era naming nostalgia**! --- ## 🤝 Support * 💬 Join the community on [**Discord**](https://discord.com/invite/ByYuaN9Qp6) * 🛠️ Report issues or contribute on [**Codeberg**](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Legacy-Mechanics)
